Safeeyes is a GTK application to protect eyes from eye strain by reminding users to take breaks while working long hours at the computer.

portlint and poudriere testport OK

There is an issue with icons cache updating, it looks like gtk-update-icon-cache is not launched. Related to bug 206019, but I can not reopened it, or should I create a new one ?
